mapper.sql: id, source_type, source_id, review_id, product_id, product_name, review_text, rating, image_urls, sentiment_label, confidence, positive_score, neutral_score, negative_score, evidence_json, similar_cases_json, agent_suggestion_json, workflow_trace_json, add_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert:
insert into litemall_review_ai_analysis
review_id, source_type, source_id, product_id, product_name, review_text, rating, image_urls, sentiment_label, confidence, positive_score, neutral_score, negative_score, evidence_json, similar_cases_json, agent_suggestion_json, workflow_trace_json, add_time, update_time, deleted,
#{reviewId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewText,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{rating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{imageUrls,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{sentimentLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confidence,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{positiveScore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{neutralScore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{negativeScore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{evidenceJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{similarCasesJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{agentSuggestionJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{workflowTraceJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{addTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.select:
select
from litemall_review_ai_analysis where source_type = #{sourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and source_id = #{sourceId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and deleted = 0 order by id desc limit 1

select count(1) as totalAnalyses, sum(case when date(add_time) = curdate() then 1 else 0 end) as analysesToday, sum(case when sentiment_label = 'negative' then 1 else 0 end) as negativeReviews, sum(case when sentiment_label = 'negative' or negative_score >= 0.65 then 1 else 0 end) as highRiskReviews, sum(case when confidence is null or confidence < 0.6 then 1 else 0 end) as pendingRiskReviews, coalesce(avg(confidence), 0) as avgConfidence, max(add_time) as lastAnalysisTime from litemall_review_ai_analysis where deleted = 0
select sentiment_label as name, count(1) as value from litemall_review_ai_analysis where deleted = 0 group by sentiment_label order by value desc

select date_format(add_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as day, count(1) as analyses, sum(case when sentiment_label = 'negative' then 1 else 0 end) as negativeReviews, sum(case when sentiment_label = 'negative' or negative_score >= 0.65 then 1 else 0 end) as highRiskReviews from litemall_review_ai_analysis where deleted = 0 and add_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 6 day) group by date_format(add_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by day asc

select 'negative_sentiment' as name, count(1) as value from litemall_review_ai_analysis where deleted = 0 and sentiment_label = 'negative' union all select 'low_confidence' as name, count(1) as value from litemall_review_ai_analysis where deleted = 0 and (confidence is null or confidence < 0.6) union all select 'high_negative_score' as name, count(1) as value from litemall_review_ai_analysis where deleted = 0 and negative_score >= 0.65

select product_id as productId, product_name as productName, count(1) as riskCount, coalesce(avg(confidence), 0) as avgConfidence from litemall_review_ai_analysis where deleted = 0 and (sentiment_label = 'negative' or negative_score >= 0.65 or confidence < 0.6) group by product_id, product_name order by riskCount desc, product_id desc limit 5
